member.name: M:Framework.Core.CommonTypes.Configuration.TestSettings.AppendValues``1(System.String,System.String[],Framework.Core.CommonTypes.Configuration.SettingUpdateOption,``0[])
member.summary: Appends the values to the value of the specified setting, given the setting update mode. provided that the values to append are not contained within the values of the look-up setting keys.
member.param: The setting key whose value to append the provided values to.
The lookup setting keys to scan their values for occurrences of the values to append. For example, paired settings that cannot overlap in their values (FACs, IACs, SFs).

Specifies, how to set the values of test settings. : Only values that are not contained in the lookup setting key array are considered for appending. : Only values that are not contained in the target setting key's value array are considered. The valuesToAppend are removed from the arrays of values of the lookup setting keys. : All the provided values are added to the target setting key's value array replacing its content. The valuesToAppend are removed from the arrays of values of the lookup setting keys.
The values to append to the value of the setting key.
member.typeparam: The type of the value to append.
member.returns: The Specifies, how to set the values of test settings.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.Cobalt.Passwords.PasswordUtils.CheckoutPassword(Microsoft.VisualStudio.TestTools.UnitTesting.TestContext,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks out a password. If no password could be checked out, null is returned. It is suggested ClearExpiredPasswords be executed prior to this method to ensure the greatest possibility of acquiring a password.
member.param: A test context.
The number of minutes from the current date and time at which the checked out password will be available for others to check out again. Defaults to 10.
A module name. If null, defaults to QED_TESTING.
A password pool. If null, defaults to GENERAL_PURPOSE.
member.returns: Information associated with the password.
member.remarks: An is thrown if testContext is null.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.Cobalt.Passwords.PasswordUtils.ClearExpiredPasswords(Microsoft.VisualStudio.TestTools.UnitTesting.TestContext,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Makes available those passwords that were previously checked out and were not checked back in but whose checkout is now expired.
member.param: A test context.
A module name. If null, defaults to QED_TESTING.
A password pool. If null, defaults to GENERAL_PURPOSE.
member.returns: The number of passwords made available for module and pool.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.Cobalt.Passwords.PasswordUtils.ClearExpiredPasswords(Microsoft.VisualStudio.TestTools.UnitTesting.TestContext)
member.summary: Makes available those passwords that were previously checked out and were not checked back in but whose checkout is now expired.
member.param: A test context.
member.returns: The number of passwords made available for module and pool.

member.returns: The number of passwords checked back in.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.Cobalt.Passwords.PasswordUtils.BlockPassword(Framework.Core.Cobalt.Passwords.PasswordUtils.PasswordDatabaseEnvironment,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Blocks all passwords associated with a Prism username. A blocked password can no longer be checked out. Only those passwords currently not checked out may be blocked.
member.param: A Password Database environment.
A Prism username.
A list of email addresses to which a notification of unblockage will be sent.
member.returns: The number of passwords successfully blocked.
member.remarks: An is thrown if prismUsername is null.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.Cobalt.Passwords.PasswordUtils.UnblockPassword(Framework.Core.Cobalt.Passwords.PasswordUtils.PasswordDatabaseEnvironment,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Unblocks all passwords associated with a Prism username. An unblocked password can be checked out. Only those passwords currently blocked may be unblocked.
member.param: A Password Database environment.
A Prism username.
A list of email addresses to which a notification of blockage will be sent.
member.returns: The number of passwords successfully unblocked.
member.remarks: An is thrown if prismUsername is null.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.Cobalt.Passwords.PasswordUtils.GetPasswordInfo(Framework.Core.Cobalt.Passwords.PasswordUtils.PasswordDatabaseEnvironment,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves information associated with a password.
member.param: A Password Database environment.
A OnePass username.
member.returns: Information associated with a password.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.Cobalt.Passwords.PasswordUtils.UpdatePassword(Framework.Core.Cobalt.Passwords.PasswordUtils.PasswordDatabaseEnvironment,Framework.Core.Cobalt.Passwords.PasswordInfo,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary:
Updates a password. Only passwords that are currently blocked may be updated. The following fields in passwordInfo will not be included in the update:
Available
TestRunId
CheckoutDateTime
CheckedOutBy
TestUsingPwd
ExpirationDateTime
PrismUsername
PrismPassword
member.param: A Password Database environment.
Password information. The PrismUsername field must be set for the correct records to be updated.
A list of email addresses to which a notification will be sent indicating information associated with the password has been changed.
member.returns: The number of passwords whose information was updated.
member.remarks: An is thrown if passwordInfo is null.

member.returns: A associated with the Password Database.

member.summary: Creates an instance of the service responsible for communicating with UDS authsession endpoints. The hostUrl differs by environment and by product.
member.param: A host URL for UDS, e.g. http://uds.int.next.qed.westlaw.com.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.Cobalt.Uds.SessionService.GenerateDefaultSession(System.String,Framework.Core.CommonTypes.Enums.Environment.CobaltProduct,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a SessionServiceonnalt.Uds.Session"/> for use with methods within the . An will be thrown if any of the fields other than emulatedPrismUsername or emulatedPrismPassword are null. Additionally, an will be thrown if either emulatedPrismUsername or emulatedPrismPassword is an empty or blank string. Finally, an will be thrown if only one of the emulatee fields is set. Only both of the emulatee fields should be set or none at all.
member.param: A value of A or B, but should only be B in the CI and Demo environments.
A value conforming with those mentioned for the {@code x-cobalt-product-container} header on the UDS Wiki.
A value corresponding with the user making the request, e.g. "UDS Tester" or "Search Tester".
A Prism username.
A Prism password.
A Prism username for the emulated of the session being created. Defaults to null if not provided.
A Prism password for the emulated of the session being created. Defaults to null if not provided.
member.returns: An initialized default .

member.name: M:Framework.Core.Cobalt.Uds.SessionService.CreateSession(Framework.Core.Cobalt.Uds.Session)
member.summary: Creates the provided session in UDS. An will be thrown if the provided session is null. Additionally, an will be thrown if either the Site value of session or the ProductName value of session are null, blank, or an empty string.
member.param: A session to be created in UDS.
member.returns: The created session in UDS.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.Cobalt.Uds.SessionService.UpdateSession(Framework.Core.Cobalt.Uds.Session)
member.summary: Updates the provided session in UDS. Ensure that the Site value of session is set to the site on which the UDS Session was originally created. If not, a 409 Conflict exception will occur and be thrown via an . An will be thrown if the provided session is null. Additionally, an will be thrown if the Site value of the session is null, blank, or an empty string.
member.param: A session to be updated in UDS.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.Cobalt.Uds.SessionService.KillSession(Framework.Core.Cobalt.Uds.Session)
member.summary: Kills the provided session in UDS. Ensure that the Site value of session is set to the site on which the UDS Session was originally created. If not, a 409 Conflict exception will occur and be thrown via an . An will be thrown if the provided session is null. Additionally, an will be thrown if the site value of the session is null, blank, or an empty string.
member.param: A session to be killed in UDS.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.Cobalt.Uds.SessionService.RetrieveSession(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a UDS Session via the provided site. If retrieving a UDS Session created on the opposite site, a 409 Conflict exception will occur and be thrown via an . An will be thrown if either parameter is null. Additionally, an will be thrown if either parameter is an empty or blank string.
member.param: A UDS Session long token.
A value of A or B, but should only be B in the CI and Demo environments.
member.returns: A UDS Session.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.Cobalt.Uds.SessionService.RetrieveSessions(System.String,System.Nullable{Framework.Core.Cobalt.Uds.Session.Status},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Net.CookieCollection)
member.summary: Retrieves a list of UDS Sessions matching the provided parameters. Any parameters provided as a null will be ignored. However, if no parameters are set, an will be thrown. At least one parameter must be set. Additionally, if any string-based parameters are provided as an empty or blank string, an will be thrown.
member.param: A value of A or B, but should only be B or PC1 in the CI and Demo environments.
A UDS Session status.
All sessions with an expires date and time before this provided date/time will be included in the result set.
A Prism GUID associated with a user.
A WestlawNext platform product.
A version of the data being used from PMD.
Cookies you'd like to pass on the authsession/query request (for example to target a site)
member.returns: A list of UDS Sessions matching the query parameters.

member.summary: A set of assertion methods useful for writing test cases.
member.remarks: All methods available in the Visual Studio Unit Testing Framework are supported. Each method requires a . Upon completion of a method, the provided will have a date and time associated with the execution time of the method, a of Assertion, and a indicating success or failure of the underlying assertion.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.QualityChecks.MsUnit.QualityAssert.AreEqual(Framework.Core.QualityChecks.Result.QualityCheck,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.String)
member.summary: Asserts that two specified doubles are equal, or within the specified accuracy of each other. The assertion fails if they are not within the specified accuracy of each other. Displays a message if the assertion fails.
member.param: A Quality Check to store the outcome of the assertion.
The first double to compare. This is the double the unit test expects.
The second double to compare. This is the double the unit test produced.
The required accuracy. The assertion will fail only if expected is different from actual by more than delta.
A message to display if the assertion fails. This message can be seen in the unit test results.

member.name: T:Framework.Core.QualityChecks.Result.Outcome
member.summary: Enumerates all valid Quality Check outcomes.

member.name: T:Framework.Core.QualityChecks.Result.QualityCheck
member.summary: Provides a means of storing information resulting from calls to Assertion and Verification methods.
member.remarks:
The following Quality Check types are provided:
Assertion
Verification
NotApplicable
The following Quality Check outcomes are provided:
Passed
Failed
Inconclusive
A Quality Check is initialized to have a type NotApplicable and an outcome of Inconclusive, but will change based on Assertion method calls or Verification method calls. A Quality Check should only be associated with the Quality Check list of a single instance. If associated with more than one instance, the Order value of the Quality Check is not guaranteed to be correct.

member.name: P:Framework.Core.QualityChecks.Result.QualityCheck.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the Quality Check.
member.value: The name of the Quality Check.
member.exception: Thrown if the provided name is null.
Thrown if the provided name is an empty string after being trimmed or its length exceeds 256 characters.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.QualityChecks.Result.QualityTestCase.GetTestOutcome
member.summary: Returns the current Outcome of the test. This function will loop through the checks and see if there are any failures or inconclusives. If there is a failing check, it will return a failed outcome. If there is no failing check, but there is an inconclusive check, it will return an inconclusive outcome. If there are not failures or inconclusives, it will return a passing outcome.

member.returns: The maximum amount of time the video recording should run for.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.TestCapture.IScreenshotTaker.GetVideoScreenshotRate
member.summary: Returns the default video screenshot rate. This number determines how often screenshots are taken. The TimeUnit for this is determined by the getTimeUnit() function. For example, if the TimeUnit is seconds, the screenshot rate is 1, and the frame rate is 2, a screenshot will be taken every second with each of those screenshots being displayed in the video for 2 seconds.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.TestCapture.IScreenshotTaker.GetVideoFrameRate
member.summary: Returns the default video screenshot rate. This number determines how often screenshots are taken. The TimeUnit for this is determined by the getTimeUnit() function. For example, if the TimeUnit is seconds, the screenshot rate is 1, and the frame rate is 2, a screenshot will be taken every second with each of those screenshots being displayed in the video for 2 seconds.
member.returns: The default video screenshot rate.

The filename of the screenshot.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.Url.UrlManager.GetUrl
member.summary: Return the default URL for the default test settings. The specified test settings don't need to match exactly. If all the test settings match the corresponding test settings of a UrlKey in the HashMap, it is considered a "match". If there are multiple matches, it will return the URL with a higher priority. If multiple matches have the same priority, it will then look at which match was more specific (had more matching test settings).
member.returns: The default URL for the default test settings.
member.exception: Thrown if no URL is found matching the specified identifiers.

member.name: M:Framework.Core.Url.UrlManager.GetUrl(Framework.Core.CommonTypes.Settings.TestSettings)

member.returns: The default URL for the specified test settings.
member.exception: Thrown if no URL is found matching the specified identifiers.

member.summary: Returns the default URL for the specified test settings with the specified replaceValues inserted. The specified test settings don't need to match exactly. If all the test settings match the corresponding test settings of a UrlKey in the HashMap, it is considered a "match". If there are multiple matches, it will return the URL with a higher priority. If multiple matches have the same priority, it will then look at which match was more specific (had more matching test settings).
member.param: Determines whether or not the URL has the scheme in front (I.e. "http://").
An array of Object arguments that should be inserted into the URL. To specify where a string should be inserted into a URL, use: "{x}" where "x" is the 0-based index of the string you want to insert.
member.returns: The default URL for the default test settings with the specified replaceValues inserted.

member.summary: Returns an enum value with the specified enum ID, implementing the specified interface, in the specified package. The enum ID is the value returned by the name() function. If enumInterfaceClass is null, it will search all enums regardless of what they implement. If packagePath is null, it will use the default package (com.trgr.quality).
member.param: The class of the interface that the desired enum implements.
The path of the package where the desired enum would be.
The ID of the enum you want.
member.returns: An enum that matches the specified enum ID, implementing the specified interface, in the specified package.
member.exception: Thrown if no enum is found matching the specified enum ID, implementing the specified interface, in the specified package.
